source: Nature Artemis I lunar mission paper
notes: Peak inner-belt absorbed dose rates spanned about 69 to 287 uGy/min across shielded Artemis I locations.

source: Nature Artemis I lunar mission paper
notes: The two HERA detector locations recorded about 134 and 287 uGy/min peak inner-belt dose rates.

source: Nature Artemis I lunar mission paper
notes: The paper reports about a one-third decrease in GCR dose equivalent during lunar fly-bys, represented here as a residual ratio of two-thirds.

source: Nature Artemis I lunar mission paper
notes: Artemis I GCR dose equivalent rates were reported as 0.96 to 1.24 mSv/day across shielded locations.

source: Nature Artemis I lunar mission paper
notes: Total Artemis I mission dose equivalents were reported as 26.7 to 35.4 mSv.

source: Nature Artemis I lunar mission paper
notes: The paper describes an approximately factor-of-two reduction in directional belt-pass dose from spacecraft orientation changes.
